title: cyclosorus simplex
intro: Cyclosorus simplex, also known as the simple fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the fern family (Cyclosorus) and is native to tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus simplex include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in skin and wound care. The herbal preparations of Cyclosorus simplex include tea, infusion, and poultice, and it is typically used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
